subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that thou art among those who have preceded others in faith - "and those who are foremost shall be foremost: these are they who will be brought near." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد للّه از سابقين در ايمان هستيد، السّابقون السّابقون اولئک هم المقرّبون
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
